rule: Replace deprecated table with CDS view or new table per SAP Note
Add ORDER BY PRIMARY KEY for SELECT INTO TABLE on HANA
Replace SELECT * with explicit field list
MATNR is 40 chars in S/4HANA. Check CHAR18 references and adjust
Replace deprecated FM with modern class/method equivalent
Replace cluster/pool table access with new transparent table
Replace obsolete ABAP keywords with modern equivalents
Replace BDC CALL TRANSACTION with equivalent BAPI or standard API call. BDC is NOT Clean Core compliant.
Replace classic ALV (REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY) with CL_SALV_TABLE or RAP + Fiori Elements for new UI paradigm.
Refactor Module Pool programs to extract business logic into API-consumable classes for Fiori compatibility.
After BAPI calls, always check RETURN table for errors and call BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT or ROLLBACK.
For BDC → BAPI conversion, map BDC screen field values to BAPI parameter structures. Refer to SAP Note 2220005.
